line_items.name: Strategy and creative development
line_items.detail: Full brand strategy, creative platform development, 3 campaign concept routes, and final creative direction; secondary research synthesis included, primary research additional.
line_items.evidence:
LINE ITEM 1: Brand Strategy & Creative Development — INR 40,00,000
Full brand strategy, creative platform development, 3 campaign concept routes, and
final creative direction. Includes synthesis of provided secondary research; primary
consumer research (if needed) would be additional.
flags: Primary consumer research excluded/additional cost

line_items.name: TVC development
line_items.detail: Hindi TVC development covered for 2 x 30-second scripts and 2 x 10-second cutdowns; English versions additional cost.
line_items.evidence:
LINE ITEM 2: TVC Development — INR 32,00,000
Script, storyboard, and animatic for:
- 2 x 30-second TVC scripts (Hindi)
- 2 x 10-second cutdown scripts (Hindi)

English language TVC versions are available at an additional cost of INR 8,00,000.
flags: Hindi only in base scope
English TVC development additional cost

line_items.name: TVC production
line_items.detail: Hindi TVC production covered including casting, location, direction, post-production, and broadcast delivery; out-of-Mumbai travel/accommodation excluded at actuals.
line_items.evidence:
LINE ITEM 3: TVC Production — INR 1,60,00,000
Full production:
- 2 x 30-second TVCs (Hindi) + 2 x 10-second cutdowns
- Casting, location, direction, post-production
- Broadcast delivery formats

Note: Travel and accommodation for crew required outside Mumbai are charged at actuals
and are not included in the above cost.
flags: Hindi only in base scope
Out-of-Mumbai travel/accommodation excluded at actuals

line_items.name: Social organic content
line_items.detail: Vendor proposes 45 posts/month for 6 months instead of RFQ-requested 60 posts/month; includes content calendar, approval workflow, and 8 nano/micro influencer collaborations per month, but micro-influencer fees above INR 5,000/post are additional.
line_items.evidence:
LINE ITEM 4: Social Organic Content — INR 60,00,000
- 45 posts/month for 6 months across Instagram (20/month), Facebook (15/month),
  YouTube (10/month)
- Content calendar and client approval workflow
- 8 nano/micro influencer collaborations per month

On volume: We are recommending 45 posts/month rather than 60.

Influencer fees: Included for nano-influencers only (posts valued up to INR 5,000
per post). Micro-influencer fees (INR 5,000-50,000 per post) are additional and
billed at actuals.
flags: Does not meet RFQ requested 60 posts/month
Micro-influencer fees additional at actuals

line_items.name: Social paid media planning
line_items.detail: Comprehensive paid media strategy, platform selection, audience framework, budget model, and KPI plan.
line_items.evidence:
LINE ITEM 5: Social Paid Media Planning — INR 15,00,000
Comprehensive paid media strategy, platform selection, audience framework, budget
model, and KPI plan.

line_items.name: Social paid media buying and optimization
line_items.detail: Paid media management fee stated separately for 6 months including setup, daily management, weekly reporting, and monthly review; media budget excluded as client direct expense.
line_items.evidence:
LINE ITEM 6: Social Paid Media Buying & Optimization
We offer end-to-end paid media management. Given that this is included in our
all-inclusive package, the paid media buying and optimization service is part of our
integrated offering to NourishPlus.

On reflection, for a 6-month campaign at the expected scale, dedicated paid media
resources require separate allocation. Please note the paid media management fee below:

Paid Media Management Fee: INR 35,00,000
(6 months; campaign setup, daily management, weekly reporting, monthly review)
flags: Conflicting statement on whether included in all-inclusive package or separately allocated
Media buying budget excluded as client direct expense

line_items.name: Kids advertising and claims compliance review
line_items.detail: ASCI compliance and internal review process stated; nutrition and health claims alignment stated. FSSAI is not explicitly named.
line_items.evidence:
LINE ITEM 7: Kids Advertising & Claims Compliance — INR 12,00,000
Brandsmith is ASCI compliant. Our creatives are always designed with regulatory
guidelines in mind. We have an internal review process for all advertising claims and
ensure all content is appropriate for the target audience.

We also ensure all nutrition and health claims in our creative work are aligned with
applicable regulations before submission for production.
flags: FSSAI not explicitly referenced
No named compliance reviewer

line_items.name: Launch program management
line_items.detail: Dedicated project coordinator, weekly status reports, and risk management/escalation included.
line_items.evidence:
LINE ITEM 8: Launch Program Management — INR 10,00,000
- Dedicated project coordinator
- Weekly status reports
- Risk management and escalation

pricing.consistency_note: The itemized total of INR 3,64,00,000 does not equal the stated total investment of INR 3,90,00,000 unless the separately disclosed contingency reserve and project infrastructure costs of INR 26,00,000 are added. Pricing is also affected by exclusions and a conflict in line item 6 inclusion wording.
pricing.evidence:
Our proposed investment for the complete NourishKids campaign:
INR 3,90,00,000 (Three Crore Ninety Lakhs Only)

ITEMIZED TOTAL |                               | 3,64,00,000

TOTAL INVESTMENT: INR 3,90,00,000

The total of INR 3,90,00,000 as stated in our executive summary includes a contingency
reserve and project infrastructure costs of INR 26,00,000 which are not broken out as
separate line items above.

GST: 18% applicable on all services
flags: Total includes INR 26,00,000 contingency reserve and project infrastructure costs not broken out as line items
GST 18% applicable on all services, therefore not included in stated totals
Media buying budget excluded
English TVC development/production excluded from base pricing
Micro-influencer fees above INR 5,000/post excluded
Travel and accommodation outside Mumbai excluded at actuals
Primary consumer research excluded
Additional revision rounds billed at INR 1,00,000 per round
Line item 6 inclusion wording is conflicting

payment_terms.value: 40% advance, 30% at mid-campaign milestone, 30% at campaign completion
payment_terms.evidence: Payment Terms: 40% advance, 30% at mid-campaign milestone, 30% at campaign completion

proposal_validity.evidence:
Date: 23 July 2026 | RFQ: RFQ-MKT-2026-NKL-001 | Validity: 60 days

Validity: 60 days from submission date

escalation_clause.value: Risk management and escalation included under launch program management
escalation_clause.evidence:
LINE ITEM 8: Launch Program Management — INR 10,00,000
- Dedicated project coordinator
- Weekly status reports
- Risk management and escalation

flags: No detailed escalation procedure or SLA stated
Brand Guarantee terms not provided; available on request

campaign_go_live.value: Social and digital activation live in 6-8 weeks from kickoff; full integrated campaign including TVC on-air in 15-16 weeks from kickoff
campaign_go_live.evidence:
We guarantee campaign go-live within 6-8 weeks of project kickoff.

NourishKids will be live in 6-8 weeks from kickoff.

Phase 9  | Campaign launch (social + digital)            | Week 15
Phase 10 | TVC on-air + full campaign live               | Week 16

Note: The 6-8 week reference in our executive summary refers to the social and digital
activation going live. The full integrated campaign including TVC on-air requires
15-16 weeks from kickoff.

total_duration.evidence: Phase 11 | Ongoing optimisation, content, management     | Weeks 16-52

timeline.consistency_note: The proposal states campaign go-live within 6-8 weeks, but the detailed timeline shows social + digital launch at Week 15 and full campaign live at Week 16. The note attempts to distinguish activation types, but the 6-8 week timing still conflicts with the phase table.
flags: Go-live timing inconsistent between executive summary and detailed timeline
No explicit kickoff date provided

team_size_claimed.evidence: We will assign a dedicated team of 15 specialists to the NourishKids account.

conflicting_info.statement_2:
On reflection, for a 6-month campaign at the expected scale, dedicated paid media resources require separate allocation. Please note the paid media management fee below:

Paid Media Management Fee: INR 35,00,000

buyer_flags: Proposal does not fully meet RFQ social organic volume requirement
FSSAI compliance review not explicitly confirmed
Pricing transparency issue: INR 26,00,000 included in total but not itemized
Paid media management inclusion/pricing conflict requires resolution
Timeline conflict between 6-8 weeks and 15-16 weeks
Multiple exclusions and actuals-based costs may materially increase total spend
TVC director not yet named and partner-network dependency exists
clarification_questions: Please confirm whether line item 6 paid media buying and optimization is included in the total investment of INR 3,90,00,000 or is an additional fee.
Please reconcile the 6-8 week go-live claim with the detailed timeline showing launch at Week 15 and full campaign live at Week 16.
Can you confirm compliance coverage explicitly includes FSSAI review for kids advertising and nutrition/health claims?
Please provide a named compliance reviewer or regulatory lead for ASCI/FSSAI review.
Can you revise line item 4 to meet the RFQ requirement of 60 social organic posts per month, or clearly state the commercial impact of doing so?
Please break out the INR 26,00,000 contingency reserve and project infrastructure costs into itemized components.
Please confirm what portion of the 8 influencer collaborations per month is included in fee, given that only nano-influencer fees up to INR 5,000/post are included.
Please provide the estimated production cost adjustment for English TVCs, currently marked TBD.
Please confirm whether out-of-Mumbai shooting is anticipated and provide a budget estimate for travel and accommodation actuals.
Please provide the detailed terms and conditions of the Brand Guarantee Program.
Please confirm whether any platform-specific advertising policy review for children-focused campaigns is included.
Please identify the proposed TVC director and key partner-network production resources.
